CustomField.formula:
AND( isTargetScheduleCfm__c, OR( AND( Month(today())=1, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c )+1, OR( property_1_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_1_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_1_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ),
AND( Month(today())=2, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c )+1, OR( property_2_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_2_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_2_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ),
AND( Month(today())=3, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c )+1, OR( property_3_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_3_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_3_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ), AND( Month(today())=4, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c )+1, OR( property_4_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_4_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_4_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ),
AND( Month(today())=5, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c )+1, OR( property_5_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_5_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_5_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ), AND( Month(today())=6, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c )+1, OR( property_6_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_6_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_6_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ), AND( Month(today())=7, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c ), OR( property_7_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_7_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_7_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ),
AND( Month(today())=8, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c ), OR( property_8_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_8_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_8_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ),
AND( Month(today())=9, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c ), OR( property_9_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_9_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_9_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ), AND( Month(today())=10, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c ), OR( property_10_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_10_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_10_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ), AND( Month(today())=11, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c ), OR( property_11_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_11_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_11_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ), AND( Month(today())=12, Year(today()) = Year( targetYear__c ), OR( property_12_1__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_12_2__c = "a0mRC000000QceL", property_12_3__c = "a0mRC000000QceL" ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 事務作業リマインド対象flg
